chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-860 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of main case 07-06-2023 Mr. Muhammad Zubair Malik, Advocate along with petitioners. M/s Shahriyar I. Awan, Assistant and Sardar Ali Shah, Additional P.G a/w SIP Rab Nawaz, I.O of Crime No.34 of 2023, P.S, Setharja. ***** Both petitioners are present. The girl petitioner has shown us her identity card and is an adult. The husband is her close relative and has been known to the girl since her childhood. Although we cannot conduct an extensive enquiry in the writ jurisdiction of this Court, prima facie, it appears that this is not a case of trafficking. FIR No.34 of 2023 of P.S, Setharja has been lodged. I.O of the case shall record statement of the girl petitioner and file statement along with supplementary Challan before learned Magistrate who is seized of the matter. Learned Magistrate shall then apply his independent mind and act in accordance with law. No arrest shall take place in Crime No.34 of 2023 until learned Magistrate has taken a decision on the same. It is hoped and expected that learned Magistrate shall do the needful within two weeks. This order restraining the arrest of any nominated accused pursuant to above FIR shall remain in field for a period of two weeks. In the meantime, the police shall render requisite protection to the petitioners. Instant petition stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
